en: Feeling so faithless, lost under the surface
ko: 믿음이 사라진 듯, 깊은 곳에서 길을 잃었어

en: Don't know what you're expecting of me
But under the pressure of walking in your shoes
ko: 하지만 네 입장에서 걷는 압박감 속에서

en: Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow
Every step that I take is another mistake to you
ko: 내가 내딛는 모든 걸음은 너에게 또 다른 실수야

en: Caught in the undertow, just caught in the undertow
I've become so numb, I can't feel you there
ko: 너무 무감각해져서, 너를 느낄 수 없어

en: I've become so tired, so much more aware
ko: 너무 피곤해져서, 더 많은 걸 깨닫게 되었어

en: I'm becoming this, all I want to do
ko: 내가 되고 싶은 건, 딱 하나야

en: Is be more like me, and be less like you
ko: 나처럼 더 많이 되고, 너처럼 덜 되기를 원해
